title: Floral Crumbly Filipino Cabbage Casserole
description: A comforting one‑pot Filipino casserole that marries the floral aroma of star anise and cinnamon with crumbly, golden breadcrumbs atop tender shredded cabbage.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180 °C (350 °F) and lightly butter a 2‑quart baking dish.
Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat; sauté onion, garlic, star anise, and cinnamon until fragrant, about 3 min. Remove star anise.
Add shredded cabbage and cook, stirring, until just wilted, about 5 min.
Stir in fish sauce, brown sugar, and coconut milk; cook for 2 min until combined.
Transfer cabbage mixture to the prepared baking dish, spreading evenly.
In a small bowl mix breadcrumbs, Parmesan, and a pinch of salt; sprinkle over the cabbage.
Bake uncovered for 20–25 min, or until the topping is golden and the cabbage tender.
Let rest 5 min, garnish with fresh basil if desired, and serve hot.
